frameworks.name: efficient coding
frameworks.one_line: Static sensory efficient coding extended to adaptive abstract-magnitude representations.

frameworks.name: population coding
frameworks.one_line: Non-monotonic tuning across a neural population defines the code.

frameworks.name: range adaptation
frameworks.one_line: Tuning collectively shifts and rescales with stimulus range.

core_question: Do human parietal number representations dynamically retune to the current numerosity range?
key_assumptions: Population activity carries the representational code
Tuning properties can be inferred from fMRI signals
Behavioral precision reflects neural representational precision
manipulations: Numerosity range varied across contexts in an estimation task
key_findings: Parietal number representations recalibrate to context
Population tuning collectively shifts and rescales with range
Neural precision scales with range and predicts behavioral precision
Individuals with stronger neural adaptation show larger behavioral adjustments
interpretations: Distributed range adaptation implements efficient coding in real time for abstract magnitudes
